name: CRUMB

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Probing Question
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, an enemy model within 1" of the target gains an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Accursed Blood
triggers.text: Remove a Glutted token. When resolving, deal +2 damage.

actions.name: Wild Rampage
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5" in a straight line, ignoring models. Deal 1 damage to models moved through this way. Then, deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: I Meant to Do That!
triggers.text: After failing, the next action this model declares this activation receives +2 Skl.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 0-9, indicating 9 health total
